summary: Tested new sidebar + Comp Generator feature. Fixed critical .env bug where EMERGENT_LLM_KEY was not loading. API worked once (returned valid comp data via curl), but subsequent calls hit LLM budget limit. All UI navigation flows (sidebar, nav items, hamburger, close) work correctly.

critical.issue: FIXED: backend/.env line 3 had CORS_ORIGINS and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY on same line without newline separator. python-dotenv failed to parse, so EMERGENT_LLM_KEY was None. Fixed by adding newline.

LLM Budget exceeded error: 'litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.021, Max budget: 0.001'. Max budget of $0.001 is too low for Claude Sonnet (~$0.02/request). This causes intermittent 500 errors.

integration_issues.issue: When backend returns 500 (budget exceeded), the error is shown correctly. However the feature is non-functional when LLM budget is exceeded.

action_items: Investigate and increase LLM max_budget for the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY session. Current max_budget=0.001 is far too low for Claude Sonnet (costs ~$0.02/request). Either increase the budget on the Emergent platform or check if there's a session-level budget parameter.
Consider adding a fallback when LLM budget is exceeded (graceful degradation message)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 3 of .env - fixed malformed env file (two variables on same line)
LLM budget constraint makes the core feature unreliable - needs investigation

success_rate.backend: 50% (1/2 calls succeeded after .env fix, then budget error)
success_rate.frontend: 80% (all navigation/UI tests passed, comp generation blocked by LLM budget)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The .env fix was applied (CORS_ORIGINS and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY were on the same line). The API returned valid results once (arv:185600, mao:104920, deal_score:7.5, 5 comps) via curl. But LLM budget limit ($0.001) may block subsequent calls. All UI navigation features work: hamburger opens sidebar, nav items work, close button works, switching between Calculator and Comp Generator views works. The comps result UI components (comp-arv, comp-mao, comp-deal-score, comps-table, comp-investor-spread, use-in-calculator-btn) all have correct data-testid attributes.
rca_of_issue: Root cause of /api/comps/generate returning 500: backend/.env had 'CORS_ORIGINS="*"EMERGENT_LLM_KEY=sk-...' as a single line (no newline between the two env vars). python-dotenv logged 'could not parse statement starting at line 3' and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY was never loaded. When code called os.environ.get('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY'), it returned None. The LlmChat._is_emergent_key() method then tried to call None.startswith('sk-emergent-') which threw AttributeError. Fix: added newline between the two variables in .env.
